products.name: PE 505
products.shortDescription: PTFE compression packing for pumps and valves
products.description: INMARCO Style PE 505 is a duplex braided packing made from Expanded PTFE, Graphite, and MoS₂, bonded at the molecular level. It offers high resiliency, excellent chemical resistance, and superior heat dissipation for extended service life. Its anti-frictional nature protects shafts and sleeves from wear and erosion.

specifications.Velocity: 25 m/s at 100 bar, 10 m/s at 200-300 bar

technicalData.Material: Duplex braided packing from Expanded PTFE, Graphite, and MoS₂
technicalData.Construction: Molecular level bonding for superior integration
technicalData.Standard: Centrifugal pumps test procedure for seal packing

features: Inmarco Style PE 505 is crafted from a unique blend of Expanded PTFE, Graphite, and MoS₂ for enhanced performance.
The packing is designed to offer superior heat dissipation and chemical resistance in challenging industrial environments.
Its anti-frictional structure helps safeguard rotating equipment from wear and erosion during continuous operation.
The dense and resilient construction ensures dimensional stability and reliable sealing under dynamic conditions.
It is compatible with a wide range of industrial media, making it suitable for diverse applications.
Trusted across industries for its consistent performance and minimal maintenance requirements.
applications: Agitators and mixers in chemical plants
Process equipment excluding molten alkali metals

products.name: PE 504
products.description: The INMARCO Style PE 504P is crafted from Premium grade expanded PTFE with graphite, molecularly bonded for enhanced performance. It delivers exceptional chemical resistance, outstanding heat dissipation, and high resilience, ensuring a longer service life. Its anti-friction properties also help prevent wear and erosion on shafts and sleeves.

technicalData.Construction: PTFE filament yarn with lubricant impregnation

features: INMARCO Style PE 504P is made from a distinctive combination of Premium grade PTFE, Graphite, designed to deliver improved performance.
The packing is engineered to provide exceptional heat dissipation and chemical resistance in demanding industrial conditions.
Its friction-reducing design protects rotating machinery from wear and erosion during prolonged use.
The strong, durable build keeps its shape and ensures secure sealing even during changing conditions.
Its broad chemical compatibility enables usage across a variety of industrial applications.
Widely recognized across sectors for its reliable performance and low upkeep demands.

products.name: HY 504
products.shortDescription: Hybrid compression packing for versatile applications
products.description: STYLE 504IVC is an improved version of duplex braided packing manufactured from Expanded PTFE intimately entrapped with high quality graphite reinforced with high structural carbon fibers. The PTFE graphite yarn is made in single molecular structure. This is a dense packing having high degree of resiliency and chemical properties. Presence of graphite & carbon enables the packing dissipate heat accurately leading to longer life of the packing.

technicalData.Construction: Hybrid fiber blend with PTFE and graphite lubrication

features: Combines benefits of multiple material technologies
Extended temperature range for versatile applications
Excellent wear resistance and durability
Good chemical compatibility in most services
Reduced break-in time and easy installation

products.name: PE 508
products.description: INMARCO Style PE 508 is a diagonally braided packing made from pure PTFE filament yarn, integrated with a proprietary break-in lubricant. This combination ensures smooth startup, enhanced pressure resistance, and long-lasting performance. Its non-toxic and inert composition supports safe and stable operation.

technicalData.Construction: Pure PTFE yarn with special lubricant package

features: Made from high-quality pure PTFE filament yarn, ensuring excellent chemical resistance and non-reactivity with process media.
The unique diagonal braid enhances structural integrity, providing uniform sealing pressure and dimensional stability.
Proprietary lubricant embedded in the yarn allows smooth startup and reduces wear during initial operation.
Performs reliably across a broad temperature range (-240°C to +290°C) and pH spectrum (0-14), suitable for diverse environments.
Withstands pressures up to 350 bar, making it ideal for demanding sealing applications in industrial systems.
Its stable structure minimizes leakage and wear, reducing downtime and maintenance costs over extended use.

products.name: PE 509
products.description: INMARCO Style PE 509 is crafted from 100% pure PTFE, offering excellent chemical resistance and thermal stability. It is designed for general industrial applications where clean, non-toxic, and non-flammable materials are essential. The packing ensures reliable sealing performance with minimal maintenance.

technicalData.Construction: Premium PTFE filament with advanced lubricant system

features: Manufactured using high-purity PTFE, this packing offers outstanding resistance to chemicals and thermal stress, making it ideal for a wide range of industrial applications.
The material is non-hazardous and gentle on the skin, ensuring safe handling and use in environments where cleanliness and safety are priorities.
It remains stable under elevated temperatures and does not support combustion, providing reliable performance in heat-intensive operations.
Designed to minimize dust generation, this packing helps maintain a cleaner workspace and reduces the risk of airborne particles during handling.
Its inert nature allows it to perform effectively in contact with a broad spectrum of chemicals, making it suitable for diverse sealing needs.
The product is recyclable and poses no known environmental hazards when used and disposed of properly, supporting sustainable practices.

products.name: HY 105
products.description: Inmarco Style HY 105 is a high-performance gland packing made from a dense braid of Aramid Yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces, reinforced with a resilient Aramid fiber core. The materials are treated with advanced lubricants to reduce friction and enhance thermal resistance, ensuring smooth operation and extended service life.

specifications.Velocity: 25 m/s at 100 bar, 10 m/s at 200-300 bar

technicalData.Material: Dense braid of Aramid Yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces with Aramid fiber core
technicalData.Construction: Duplex braid with high-tensile reinforcement
technicalData.Lubrication: Advanced lubricants for reduced friction and enhanced thermal resistance
technicalData.Core: Resilient Aramid fiber core for mechanical strength

features: Inmarco Style HY 105 is a unique combination of aramid yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces, designed for enhanced sealing performance
The packing is reinforced with a high-tensile Aramid fiber core, offering exceptional mechanical strength and dimensional stability
PTFE faces are treated with inert, high-temperature lubricants to ensure smooth, low-friction operation
Aramid corners are lubricated with antifrictional fluoropolymer dispersion, preventing corner failures in reciprocating equipment
Developed to deliver reliable sealing in chemically aggressive and mechanically demanding environments
Offers excellent compatibility with a wide range of industrial media including slurries, pigments, and synthetic compounds
applications: Mixers and agitators in process industries
Reactors in chemical and fertilizer plants

products.name: HY 105T
products.shortDescription: Hybrid packing with enhanced temperature resistance
products.description: INMARCO Style HY 105T is a high-performance gland packing made from Aldehyde Yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces, reinforced with a resilient PTFE cord core. Its dense braided construction ensures excellent strength, dimensional stability, and sealing capability under extreme conditions. This makes it ideal for pumps, valves, mixers, and reactors.

technicalData.Construction: High-temperature hybrid blend with enhanced lubricants

features: Combines Aldehyde Yarn corners with PTFE Yarn faces and a high-tensile PTFE cord core, delivering superior mechanical strength and sealing performance
Withstands pressures up to 500 bar, making it ideal for high-pressure applications in pumps, valves, and reactors
PTFE fibers and specialized lubricants reduce friction, ensuring cooler shaft runs and minimizing wear on plungers and valve stems
Resistant to a wide range of aggressive media including ammonia, urea, carbamate, detergents, pigments, and synthetic materials
Performs reliably in dry, abrasive, and corrosive environments, extending service life even under harsh operating conditions
Suitable for centrifugal, reciprocating, and plunger pumps, as well as agitators, mixers, extruders, and more

products.name: HY 107
products.description: Inmarco style HY 107 is a unique multi yarn packing designed for harsh applications having Aramid filament yarn at the corners and PTFE graphited yarn at the faces having core of Aramid filament.

technicalData.Construction: Premium hybrid fiber blend with PTFE and graphite

features: The packing exhibits a dense construction, ensuring minimal gaps or voids. This density contributes to its exceptional sealability
When compressed, the packing forms a tight barrier, effectively preventing fluid leakage
It is designed to withstand high pressure conditions. Its robust materials and construction make it suitable for applications where pressure levels are significant
Whether in pumps, valves, or other equipment, this packing maintains its integrity even under substantial pressure
A standout feature of this packing is its extreme durability when exposed to Ammonia and Carbamate solutions
It boasts wide chemical resistance and handles various corrosive substances without compromising its sealing properties

products.name: HY 107E
products.description: Inmarco style HY 107 is a unique multi yarn packing designed for harsh applications having Aramid filament yarn at the corners and PTFE graphited yarn at the faces having core of Aramid filament.

technicalData.Construction: Economic hybrid fiber with standard lubrication

features: The packing exhibits a dense construction, ensuring minimal gaps or voids. This density contributes to its exceptional sealability
When compressed, the packing forms a tight barrier, effectively preventing fluid leakage
It is designed to withstand high pressure conditions. Its robust materials and construction make it suitable for applications where pressure levels are significant
Whether in pumps, valves, or other equipment, this packing maintains its integrity even under substantial pressure
A standout feature of this packing is its extreme durability when exposed to Ammonia and Carbamate solutions
It boasts wide chemical resistance and handles various corrosive substances without compromising its sealing properties

products.name: HY 107 EPT
products.description: HY 107 EPT features EPDM reinforcement for enhanced chemical resistance and sealing performance.

technicalData.Construction: Hybrid fibers with EPDM rubber reinforcement

features: EPDM reinforcement for enhanced resilience
Excellent water and steam resistance
Good chemical compatibility with acids and alkalis
Superior compression recovery properties
Economical solution for water services

products.name: HY 175
products.description: STYLE REBACKLON 175 is a combination of duplex braided packing with inmalon yarn and expanded PTFE intimately bonded with special quality graphite yarn incorporating break-in-lubricant in a special process. This is a dense packing having high degree of resiliency and chemical properties.

technicalData.Construction: Balanced hybrid fiber blend with standard lubricants

features: Combination of duplex braided packing with inmalon yarn and expanded PTFE intimately bonded with special quality graphite yarn
Incorporates break-in-lubricant in a special process for extra lubrication during complete operational life
Dense packing with high degree of resiliency and chemical properties
Presence of graphite enables accurate heat dissipation leading to longer packing life
Highly anti-frictional, safeguarding shaft/sleeves from wear/erosion
Excellent resistance to almost all known chemicals

products.name: PA 106
products.description: INMARCO Style PA 106 is a high-performance packing made from abrasion-resistant co-polymer fiber yarn, impregnated with PTFE-based Inflon dispersion. It offers excellent resistance to brine, corrosive media, and acidic reactions, making it ideal for harsh industrial environments.

technicalData.Construction: High-performance polyimide fiber with PTFE coating

features: Made from tough co-polymer fiber yarn, ensuring durability and long-lasting performance in abrasive environments.
PTFE-based impregnation provides excellent resistance to saline water and corrosive chemicals.
Incorporates break-in and run-in lubricants for smooth installation, reduced friction, and protection against sleeve or shaft wear.
Maintains shape and integrity even under extreme operating conditions, minimizing deformation risks.
Suitable for a wide range of aggressive media, including slurries, chemicals, and saline solutions.
Ideal for pumps, valves, mixers, reactors, and other rotating or reciprocating equipment in challenging environments.

products.name: OR 125
products.description: INMARCO Style OR 125 is a premium-grade packing made from high-strength acrylic fiber. It is impregnated with proprietary PTFE based dispersion, enhancing its chemical resistance and sealing performance. The packing offers excellent mechanical integrity and durability.

technicalData.Construction: FDA compliant organic fiber with food-grade lubricant

features: Impregnated with proprietary PTFE based dispersion, the packing offers superior resistance to a wide range of chemicals, ensuring long-term reliability in challenging environments.
Braided from strong acrylic fibers, it offers superior durability and tensile strength compared to traditional natural or vegetable fiber-based packings.
The PTFE treatment provides smooth lubrication, reducing friction and minimizing wear on shafts and other moving components.
The advanced impregnation process increases packing density, resulting in better sealing efficiency and reduced leakage under pressure.
Designed to balance performance and affordability, it serves as a reliable choice for industrial sealing without compromising on quality.
The packing maintains its integrity across a wide temperature range, ensuring consistent sealing performance even under fluctuating thermal conditions.

products.name: OR 125G
products.description: STYLE OR 125G is a premium grade economical packing braided from extremely strong acrylic fiber and further impregnated with graphite based intherm dispersion which is for better heat dissipation.

technicalData.Construction: Organic fiber reinforced with graphite particles

features: Proprietary inflon/intherm dispersion enhances the density and sealing ability.
Safe and stays under clean water application.
Comparatively better mechanical strength as against natural and vegetable fibers.
Excellent lubrication leading to minimal shaft wear.
An economical choice for fluid handling equipment.
Intherm dispersion enhances the thermal conductivity of the packing.

products.name: CG 101
products.description: Inmarco Style CG 101 is a high-performance packing manufactured from carbon filament yarn. It is impregnated with a thermally cured graphite-based in-therm dispersion, which acts as a blocking agent and further reduces stem friction. This packing is designed to prevent leakage of gaseous or liquid materials. Additionally, it incorporates a passive corrosion inhibitor to prevent galvanic corrosion.

technicalData.Material: Carbon filament yarn with graphite-based in-therm dispersion
technicalData.Corrosion Protection: Passive corrosion inhibitor to prevent galvanic corrosion
technicalData.Construction: High-performance braided packing

features: The packing is thoroughly impregnated with graphite-based in-therm dispersion, ensuring minimal gaps or voids. This impregnation contributes to its exceptional friction-free runs even in high endurance
When compressed, the packing forms a tight barrier, effectively preventing fluid leakage
It is designed to withstand high-pressure conditions. Its robust materials and construction make it suitable for applications where pressure levels are significant

It boasts wide chemical resistance and handles various corrosive substances, including acids, alkalis, solvents, organic chemicals, gases, steam, and thermic fluids, without compromising its sealing properties
Additionally, its abrasion resistance ensures longevity, even in demanding industrial settings
The packing material penetrates well into irregular surfaces, conforming closely to the equipment it seals
applications: Pumps and valves in chemical processing
Both dynamic and static sealing applications

products.name: PE 102
products.description: INMARCO Style PE 102 is an inter-braided packing made from expanded PTFE and graphite fiber. This molecular blend offers excellent chemical resistance, reduced friction, and enhanced heat conduction. It ensures superior sealing performance compared to conventional PTFE graphite packings.

technicalData.Construction: Polyimide fiber with graphite and PTFE dispersion

features: With a unique PTFE and graphite blend, it withstands a wide range of corrosive media including acids, alkalis, and organic chemicals.
Graphite integration improves heat dissipation, allowing equipment to run cooler and more efficiently under high temperatures.
The packing minimizes friction against shafts and sleeves, reducing wear and extending equipment life.
Exhibits low thermal expansion, maintaining consistent sealing performance even in fluctuating temperature conditions.
Prevents static charge build-up, making it safe for use in sensitive chemical and hydrocarbon environments.
Graphite is molecularly bonded during polymerisation, ensuring continuous lubrication and preventing hardening over time.

products.name: CG 101E
products.description: CG 101E provides cost-effective graphite sealing solutions for moderate temperature applications.

technicalData.Construction: Flexible graphite ribbon with standard yarn reinforcement

features: Economical graphite solution for budget-conscious applications
Good thermal conductivity and self-lubrication
Universal chemical resistance
Easy installation and forming
Suitable for moderate temperature services

products.name: CG 100
products.description: CG 100 is an expanded flexible pure graphite fibre (purity 99% minimum) braided packing reinforced with non metallic filament. The packing is extrusion resistant and capable of withstanding higher pressure both in dynamic and static condition.

technicalData.Construction: Flexible graphite with carbon fiber reinforcement

features: Self generating lubrication accommodates and aids self adjustment on stem upon tighting of gland
Most effective sealing performance & no scoring of sleeve, plunger or stem
Hi-therm lubrication developed by us, in-house R & D prevents the body and shaft leakage on static or dynamic equipment
Suits for high mechanical & cylindrical load
Excellent sealing during long duration

products.name: CG 102
products.description: INMARCO Style CG 102 is crafted from premium expanded graphite yarn with 98% carbon content, reinforced with Inconel wire. It is impregnated with proprietary graphite based dispersion and a corrosion inhibitor to protect equipment from galvanic damage. This ensures durability and reliability in high-pressure environments.

technicalData.Construction: Premium flexible graphite with inconel wire reinforcement

features: Made from expanded graphite yarn with a minimum 98% carbon content, ensuring excellent thermal conductivity and chemical resistance across a wide range of industrial media
Braided with strong yet flexible Inconel wire, the packing maintains structural integrity under high pressure and temperature, with optional multi-wire reinforcement for surge resistance
Developed through in-house R&D, this advanced dispersion prevents leakage and enhances sealing performance in both static and dynamic equipment
The packing generates its own lubrication, allowing smooth stem adjustment during gland tightening and reducing wear on moving parts
Integrated sacrificial metal corrosion inhibitors safeguard equipment from galvanic corrosion, preventing pitting on valve stems and bodies
Safe for use in sensitive environments, as it does not contaminate the media and remains chemically inert

products.name: IN 123
products.description: INMARCO Style IN 123 is a ceramic fibre packing rope made from alumina and silica-based refractory oxides. It delivers excellent thermal and electrical insulation, ideal for static applications in high-temperature environments. The product is engineered to withstand harsh industrial conditions with consistent reliability.

technicalData.Material: Ceramic fibre made from alumina and silica-based refractory oxides
technicalData.Construction: Packing rope for static applications
technicalData.Performance: Low ignition loss for long-term insulation

features: Made from refractory oxides like alumina and silica, it withstands extreme temperatures up to 1260°C, making it ideal for high-heat industrial environments.
Offers superior thermal and electrical insulation, helping maintain safe operating conditions and reducing energy loss.
Specifically engineered for static sealing applications, ensuring stable performance without wear from dynamic movement.
The material is non-toxic, non-hazardous, and environmentally friendly, promoting a safer workplace for personnel.
Its non-combustible nature and electrical non-conductivity enhance fire safety and operational reliability.
Maintains mechanical integrity and insulation efficiency even under prolonged exposure to high temperatures and industrial stress.
applications: Static sealing in high-temperature industrial environments

products.name: IN 123I
products.description: INMARCO Style IN 123I is a ceramic fibre packing rope made from alumina and silica-based refractory oxides with Inconel wire reinforcement. It delivers excellent thermal and electrical insulation, ideal for static applications in high-temperature environments. The product is engineered to withstand harsh industrial conditions with consistent reliability.

technicalData.Material: Ceramic fibre made from alumina and silica-based refractory oxides with inconel wire reinforcement
technicalData.Construction: Packing rope with inconel wire core for enhanced durability

features: Made from refractory oxides like alumina and silica, it withstands extreme temperatures up to 1260°C, making it ideal for high-heat industrial environments.
Offers superior thermal and electrical insulation, helping maintain safe operating conditions and reducing energy loss.
Specifically engineered for static sealing applications, ensuring stable performance without wear from dynamic movement.
The material is non-toxic, non-hazardous, and environmentally friendly, promoting a safer workplace for personnel.
Its non-combustible nature and electrical non-conductivity enhance fire safety and operational reliability.
Maintains mechanical integrity and insulation efficiency even under prolonged exposure to high temperatures and industrial stress.
applications: Applications where standard ceramic rope needs reinforcement

products.name: OR 120
products.description: STYLE 120 is a special developed ramie fibre packing with a highly tenacious synthetic reinforcement which enhances the tensile strength, increases operational life of packing. This packing is dispersed with pure PTFE and does excellent sealing in stern tubes.

technicalData.Construction: Organic fiber blend with mineral oil lubricant

features: Proprietary Inflon dispersion enhances the density and the sealing ability. Safe & stays clean under operation.
Highest quality Ramie Fibre with Aramid reinforcement.
Comparatively better mechanical strength.
Excellent lubrication leading to minimal shaft wear.
Special water absorption capabilities of Ramie fibre enhance the sealing capabilities.

products.name: HY 120AR
products.description: STYLE 120AR is a premium grade economical packing manufactured from Aramid yarn in the core & corner all four faces from Ramie fiber packing with a highly tenacious synthetic reinforcement which enhances the tensile strength, increase operational life of packing. This packing is dispersed with pure PTFE and does excellent sealing in stern tubes.

technicalData.Construction: Aramid fiber core with PTFE and graphite coating

features: Highest quality Ramie Fibre with Aramid reinforcement
Better mechanical strength
Excellent lubrication leading to minimal shaft wear
Special water absorption capabilities of Ramie fibre enhance the sealing capabilities

products.name: OR 120F
products.description: OR 120F is suitable for food processing applications with FDA compliant materials for sanitary services.

technicalData.Construction: FDA compliant organic fibers with food-grade lubricant

features: FDA approved for direct food contact
Non-toxic and tasteless construction
Easy to clean and sanitize
Good sealing in water-based media
Economical for food industry applications

products.name: IN 140
products.description: IN 140 offers high-temperature ceramic fiber insulation for extreme thermal protection applications.

technicalData.Construction: Alumina-silica ceramic fiber blanket

features: Extreme temperature resistance up to 1200°C
Exceptional thermal insulation efficiency
Low thermal mass for rapid heating/cooling
Chemical stability in most environments
Lightweight and flexible installation

products.name: CG 900
products.description: Style CG 900 is a premium flexible expanded graphite fiber packing with high carbon content. It is impregnated with proprietary THERMOLUBE dispersion and reinforced with multiple Inconel/SS wires in each strand. The packing also incorporates an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor to safeguard the parent body from galvanic corrosion and reduce loss on ignition.

technicalData.Construction: Ultra-pure flexible graphite with specialty alloy reinforcement

features: Contains Inorganic Passive Corrosion Inhibitor to Prevent Galvanic Corrosion and Reduce Loss on Ignition, ensuring longer service life
Easily wraps around small diameter shafts and spindles without compromising integrity
Inconel wire reinforcement enhances resistance to pressure surges and mechanical stress
Minimal volume loss during operation, preventing premature leakage and extending service life
Automatically adapts during gland tightening, reducing maintenance needs
THERMOLUBE dispersion fills micro-gaps between yarns, ensuring tight sealing
applications: Severe duty valve and pump applications

products.name: HY 501
products.description: Inmarco Style HY 501 is a versatile hybrid packing made from Non-Metallic Expanded Pure Graphite yarn. It is impregnated with proprietary Graphite-based dispersion and an INORGANIC PASSIVE CORROSION INHIBITOR. This combination ensures excellent chemical resistance, thermal conductivity, and protection against galvanic corrosion.

technicalData.Construction: Aramid and PTFE hybrid with graphite dispersion

features: Exceptional chemical resistance to a wide range of media
High thermal conductivity for efficient heat dissipation
Low oxidation rate and long service life
Suitable for both dynamic and static applications Class 150 up to Class 1500. Please consult Inmarco for higher Class range suitability
Fire-safe design for use in fire-rated applications

products.name: CG 503
products.description: Inmarco Style CG 503 is a high-performance packing made from expanded graphite and carbon fibre yarn, ideal for high-pressure and high-temperature valves. Its core is reinforced with Inconel wire and jacketed with fine mesh, while the outer layer uses low-friction carbon yarn. This design ensures reliable sealing in control valves and soot blower applications.

technicalData.Construction: High-purity expanded graphite with corrosion-resistant wire

features: Designed to perform under high temperatures and pressures, making it suitable for critical valve applications
Made from expanded graphite and carbon fibre yarn, reinforced with Inconel wire mesh for enhanced durability and sealing efficiency
Treated with an inorganic passive corrosion inhibitor that prevents galvanic corrosion and extends equipment life
Proprietary graphite-based dispersion improves heat dissipation and acts as a sealing enhancer, ensuring consistent performance
Conforms to worn or pitted valve surfaces, maintaining a smooth seal without scoring or damage
The packing remains intact during cutting and allows for smooth removal during shutdowns, reducing maintenance time

products.name: PE 104
products.description: INMARCO Style PE 104 is a high-performance packing made from virgin PTFE fiber yarn, interlock braided with proprietary lubricant and PTFE dispersion. Its non-toxic and chemically inert nature ensures purity and safety of fluid media. The construction offers excellent dimensional stability and resists disintegration during use.

technicalData.Construction: PTFE fiber with enhanced lubricant package

features: Made from high-quality virgin PTFE fiber yarn, ensuring excellent chemical resistance and purity in sealing applications.
The interlock braided structure enhances mechanical strength and prevents unraveling, even under high stress.
Incorporates a special lubricant and PTFE dispersion within the molecular structure, reducing friction and wear during operation.
Maintains shape and integrity under varying pressures and temperatures, suitable for both dynamic and static conditions.
Safe for use in sensitive environments, as it does not contaminate the media and remains chemically inert.
Designed for extended service life with minimal maintenance, reducing downtime and operational costs.

products.name: OR 151
products.description: OR 151 provides basic sealing for general applications with cost-effective organic fiber construction.

technicalData.Construction: Standard organic fiber with basic lubrication

features: Most economical packing solution
Suitable for low-pressure water applications
Easy to install and replace
Good conformability to stuffing boxes
Minimal equipment investment required

products.name: OR 156
products.description: OR 156 offers improved performance over standard organic packings with enhanced fiber treatment.

technicalData.Construction: Enhanced organic fiber with improved lubricant system

features: Enhanced performance over standard organic packings
Improved temperature and pressure capability
Better chemical compatibility range
Good value for mid-range applications
Longer service life than economy grades

products.name: HY 606
products.description: INMARCO Style HY 606 is a high-performance packing made from abrasion-resistant Aldehyde fibre yarn. It is impregnated with PTFE-based Inflon dispersion and treated with break-in and run-in lubricants. These additives reduce friction and protect sleeves and shafts from erosion.

technicalData.Construction: Heavy-duty aramid and PTFE with enhanced graphite

features: Exceptional resistance to high temperatures and thermal stress
Low friction performance due to advanced PTFE-based lubrication
Suitable for both rotary and reciprocating equipment in tough conditions
Resilient core construction ensures long-lasting structural integrity
Maintains dimensional stability under mechanical and thermal loads
Available in a wide range of sizes for diverse industrial applications

products.name: CG 501C
products.description: INMARCO Style 501C is a specially developed hybrid combination packing of Non-Metallic Expanded Pure Graphite yarn reinforced with high structural Carbon filament at core, four corners and carrier. The packing is impregnated with proprietary THERMOLUBE Graphite based dispersion and also INORGANIC PASSIVE CORROSION INHIBITOR. This Passive Corrosion Inhibitor safeguards parent equipment from Galvanic Corrosion and also reduction of LOSS ON IGNITION.

technicalData.Construction: Clean-service flexible graphite with minimal binder

features: Excellent dry run capabilities and hence reduce continuous water flashing
Incorporation of corrosion inhibitor prevents corrosion and pitting on parent equipment
THERMOLUBE dispersion acts as a blocking agent
The packing adopts to worn out surface and pitting with smooth running
Dissipates heat without chemical hardening

products.name: HY 801
products.description: Inmarco Style HY801 is a versatile hybrid packing made from Non-Metallic Expanded Pure Graphite yarn, reinforced with high structural Carbon filament. It offers exceptional chemical resistance and thermal conductivity.

technicalData.Construction: Premium hybrid blend optimized for valve applications

features: Exceptional chemical resistance to a wide range of media
High thermal conductivity for efficient heat dissipation
Low oxidation rate and long service life
Suitable for both dynamic and static applications Class 150 up to Class 1500. Please consult Inmarco for higher Class range suitability
Fire-safe design for use in fire-rated applications
applications: Severe service gate and globe valves

products.name: PA 499
products.description: Inmarco style PA 499 is an advanced synthetic packing tough, soft, flexible with enhanced sliding feature, impregnated with fluoropolymer dispersion. This new generation packing addresses the limitations of earlier synthetic packings, making it suitable for challenging applications combined with abrasion and chemical media. By combining the durability of aramid with the low friction characteristics of material like carbon fiber, it stands out as an excellent choice for diverse applications.

technicalData.Construction: Advanced polyimide with specialty lubricant system

features: Offers excellent flexibility and wear resistance, ensuring long-lasting performance.
Generates less heat during operation, enhancing efficiency and safety.
Safe for use in various environments without causing corrosion or contamination.
Resists abrasion effectively without causing sleeve scoring, unlike traditional aramid packing.
Reduced water consumption: Significantly lowers water consumption, contributing to cost savings and environmental sustainability.
Prevents shaft scoring, a common issue with many synthetic packings.

products.name: HY 510
products.description: Style HY 510EC is a high-performance hybrid packing designed for demanding industrial and marine applications. It is made from PTFE-based fibers with graphite in the molecular structure and Aramid reinforcement, and features a hollow elastomer core that provides enhanced resiliency. This advanced construction ensures reliable sealing and a long service life, particularly in seawater applications.

technicalData.Construction: Standard hybrid fiber with PTFE and graphite coating

features: Adequate lubrication for low friction runs
No embrittlement or abrasion to parent equipment
Graphite Inblend controls the thermal expansion of PTFE by around 20%, eliminating chances of overheating and extrusion
Excellent heat dissipation to ensure cool run and thus guarantee excellent sealing performance
Hollow elastomer core ensures excellent resiliency

products.name: PE 104C
products.description: INMARCO Style 104C is a high-performance gland packing designed for control valves operating under extreme industrial conditions. It offers excellent resilience, mechanical strength, and sealing reliability, making it ideal for high-pressure and high-temperature environments.

technicalData.Construction: Clean-service PTFE with minimal binder content
technicalData.Certification: API 622 Type Test Qualified, FDA compliant

features: The packing is constructed using a combination of PTFE and carbon yarn, engineered for durability and high performance.
Its carbon yarn core is reinforced to withstand mechanical stress and thermal fluctuations in control valve operations.
The outer PTFE jacket provides excellent chemical resistance and ensures smooth, low-friction sealing.
Treated with a fluoropolymer dispersion and corrosion inhibitor, the packing resists degradation in aggressive media.
The PTFE suspensoid acts as a blocking agent, enhancing sealing efficiency and reducing leakage.
Designed for easy installation and removal, minimizing downtime during maintenance.

products.name: HY 105PT
products.description: HY 105PT combines hybrid construction with PTFE for improved lubricity and chemical resistance.

technicalData.Construction: Hybrid core with enhanced PTFE coating

features: Enhanced PTFE content for superior lubricity
Improved chemical compatibility
Low friction and reduced wear
Good resilience and recovery
Extended service life

products.name: PE 504C
products.description: The INMARCO Style PE 504P is crafted from Premium grade expanded PTFE with graphite, molecularly bonded for enhanced performance. It delivers exceptional chemical resistance, outstanding heat dissipation, and high resilience, ensuring a longer service life. Its anti-friction properties also help prevent wear and erosion on shafts and sleeves.

The packing is engineered to provide exceptional heat dissipation and chemical resistance in demanding industrial conditions.
Its friction-reducing design protects rotating machinery from wear and erosion during prolonged use.
The strong, durable build keeps its shape and ensures secure sealing even during changing conditions.

products.name: PA 106G
products.description: PA 106G combines polyimide strength with graphite lubrication for enhanced thermal performance.

products.name: PA 106E
products.description: Inmarco style PA 106E is a superior packing material designed to resist both abrasion and corrosion. It is crafted from Aramid fiber yarn, which is thoroughly impregnated with a PTFE suspension and incorporates a specialized inert lubricant for initial use.

technicalData.Construction: Enhanced polyimide with advanced lubricant system

features: The combination of fibrous Aramid and PTFE provides rich lubrication, significantly reducing friction even when sealing abrasive or viscous media, pigments, and molten synthetic formulations.
The tough fibrous Aramid construction ensures excellent dimensional stability and resistance to deformation under demanding conditions.
This packing offers outstanding resistance to penetration and fatigue caused by abrasive particles during service, ensuring long-lasting performance.
The packing material is non-contaminating, making it suitable for applications where purity is crucial.
Excellent slip properties protect shaft sleeves, reducing wear and extending the lifespan of equipment.
Additionally, its abrasion resistance ensures longevity, even in demanding industrial settings.

products.name: PA 104A
products.description: INMARCO Style PA 104A is a high-performance gland packing developed for control valves in demanding industrial environments. It features an aramid yarn core that offers excellent mechanical strength and wear resistance. The outer PTFE jacket ensures smooth operation and chemical compatibility across various media.

technicalData.Construction: Advanced polyimide with multi-layer construction

features: The packing is built around a high-strength aramid yarn core, offering excellent resistance to wear, abrasion, and mechanical stress ideal for dynamic valve operations.
The outer layer of pure PTFE yarn ensures low-friction sealing and superior chemical compatibility, enabling smooth valve movement and reduced energy loss.
The packing is treated with advanced fluoropolymer dispersion and corrosion inhibitors, enhancing its durability and resistance to aggressive industrial media.
A PTFE suspensoid acts as a blocking agent within the packing, effectively sealing micro-paths and minimizing leakage even under fluctuating conditions.
The packing adapts well to surface imperfections, ensuring a tight seal and reducing the risk of bypass leakage in both static and dynamic applications.
Designed for user convenience, PE 104A allows quick installation and removal, minimizing downtime during maintenance and improving operational efficiency.

products.name: PE 504P

It delivers exceptional chemical resistance, outstanding heat dissipation, and high resilience, ensuring a longer service life. Its anti-friction properties also help prevent wear and erosion on shafts and sleeves.

This Passive Corrosion Inhibitor safeguards parent equipment from Galvanic Corrosion and also reduction of loss on ignition.

products.name: HY 105 HD
products.description: INMARCO Style HY 105HD is a dense braided gland packing made with Aramid Yarn corners and PTFE Yarn faces. It includes a high-tensile Aramid fiber core for strength and dimensional stability. Designed for high-pressure and high-temperature environments.

technicalData.Construction: Heavy-duty aramid and PTFE with reinforced graphite

features: High-Density Braided Construction - The packing is densely braided using Aramid and PTFE yarns, ensuring excellent sealability and dimensional stability under high mechanical stress
Aramid Yarn corners provide structural strength and resistance to corner failures, while PTFE Yarn faces offer low friction and cool shaft operation
Aramid fibers are treated with antifrictional fluoropolymer and break-in lubricant; PTFE faces are lubricated with inert, high-temperature-resistant compounds for smooth performance
Resistant to a broad range of chemicals including ammonia, urea, carbamate condensate, detergents, pigments, and synthetic molten materials used in fertilizer production
PTFE's low-friction properties reduce wear on plungers and valve stems, extending equipment life and reducing maintenance costs
Ideal for use in centrifugal, reciprocating, and plunger pumps, as well as valves, agitators, mixers, extruders, and reactors across various industries

products.name: HY 107 HD
products.description: INMARCO Style HY 107HD is a high-density combination packing made with Aramid Fibre Yarn at the corners and PTFE Graphite Yarn at the faces, reinforced with an Aramid core. It is treated with antifrictional fluoropolymer dispersion and a special break-in lubricant. This design ensures excellent chemical resistance, dimensional stability, and thermal control.

technicalData.Construction: Premium heavy-duty hybrid with reinforced construction

features: High-Density Construction - Densely braided for superior sealability and structural integrity, ideal for high-pressure sealing environments
Designed for Critical Fertilizer Applications - Specifically engineered for use in fertilizer plants, especially in carbamate and urea pump systems, where reliability is essential
Aramid Fibre Yarn at the corners provides mechanical strength, while PTFE Graphite Yarn at the faces ensures smooth operation and thermal control
Impregnated with antifrictional fluoropolymer dispersion and break-in lubricant to minimize startup wear and extend service life
Withstands harsh chemicals and abrasive media, ensuring long-term durability in demanding industrial conditions
Graphite-faced surfaces enhance heat dissipation, allowing cooler operation and reducing thermal stress on equipment

products.name: OR 125SR
products.description: INMARCO Style OR 125SR is a high-performance packing solution designed for industrial sealing applications. It features a silicon rubber core that enhances elasticity, compression recovery, and sealing adaptability under dynamic conditions. Braided from high-strength acrylic fibers and treated with proprietary PTFE based dispersion, it ensures excellent chemical resistance and mechanical integrity.

technicalData.Construction: Steam-resistant organic fiber with high-temp lubricant

features: The integrated silicon rubber core enhances the packing's ability to recover after compression, ensuring a tight seal even under fluctuating pressure and dynamic conditions.
Impregnated with proprietary PTFE dispersion, OR 125 SR resists a wide range of chemicals, making it suitable for aggressive media and extending service life.
The outer structure is braided from durable acrylic fibers, offering superior tensile strength and mechanical integrity compared to traditional fiber-based packings.
PTFE treatment provides smooth lubrication, reducing friction and minimizing shaft wear, which helps in maintaining equipment efficiency and longevity.
The combination of PTFE and silicon rubber increases packing density, improving sealing performance and reducing leakage under high pressure.
Designed for hygienic applications, it minimizes contamination and is safe for use in clean water systems and mild chemical processes.

These rings have oxidation inhibitors and advanced corrosion-resistant properties, meeting stringent nuclear industry specifications. They are precisely sized, density-controlled, and free from binders, elastomers, or any fillers.

products.name: INMATEX EPTFE SHEET/GASKET
products.description: INMATEX EXPANDED PTFE (ePTFE) SHEET / GASKET WITH EXCEPTIONAL MALLEABILITY FOR EXTREME OPERATING CONDITION. With exceptionally uniform density and highly fibrillated micro structure (no unexpanded nodes), INMATEX multi-directional expanded PTFE (ePTFE) sheet/gasket has excellent resistance to pressure, creep relaxation, cold flow. It is made of 100% virgin PTFE. It is extremely soft but tough and highly compressible. It is non-staining and non-contaminating and one of the highest resistance to aggressive media, best in-class reliability as to seal flange joints and piping equipments.

products.name: SST 323
products.description: TYPE SST 323 Flexible pure Graphite Tanged Gasket Sheet is manufactured from perforated tanged SS sheet sandwich between two layers of flexible pure graphite sheet. The whole process of manufacturing flexible pure graphite tanged gasket sheet is mechanical without incorporation of any additives on bonding materials. TYPE SST 323 the flexible pure graphite sheet is having 99% to 99.9%. These are extremely suitable for high temperature and high pressure application. These gaskets are highly resilient and as such easily adopts to irregularities of flange or surface to make perfect seal. SS tanged gaskets are suitable for metallic, glass, enamel flanges and are designed for trouble free change over which ultimately reduces maintenance cost. They are dimensionally stable under extreme pressure surge. These are also suitable for cryogenic services.

products.name: Aramid Based Wiping Pad
products.material: Copolymer Yarn with High-Tensile Inorganic Filaments
products.shortDescription: High-performance wiping pad made from copolymer yarn for wire drawing and galvanizing industries
products.description: INMARCO Wiping Pad is made from tough yet smooth copolymer yarn, lubricated with mineral oil and fluoropolymer suspensoid, and reinforced with high-tensile inorganic filaments. Its dense and heavy construction is produced on a tailor-made machine to ensure stable performance in wire drawing and galvanizing operations. It offers a longer working life than conventional wiping pads and maintains smooth but durable wiping action during continuous use. The pad is designed to handle demanding industrial wiping conditions without compromising wire surface quality or process consistency.

Maintains steady wiping pressure during wire movement for consistent processing output
Reduces frequent replacement, maintaining longer operational cycles and smoother workflow

products.description: INMARCO High Temperature Wiping Pad is crafted from a hybrid blend of Carbon fiber, Volcanic rock fiber, and Alumino Silicate fiber. Braided through a specialized process, it offers exceptional density and durability. The pad is impregnated with a Special PTFE Suspensoid for consistent wire galvanization. Its unique fiber combination ensures high resistance to temperature, abrasion, and chemicals. Designed for wire drawing and galvanizing industries, it lasts 3–4 times longer than conventional co-polymer yarn pads. A reliable solution for demanding industrial environments.
